news.headline: NASA has awarded a contract to Metis Technology Solutions Inc. for aerospace research and simulation services.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, NASA announced the selection of Metis Technology Solutions Inc. from Albuquerque, New Mexico, to provide engineering services and handle the development and maintenance of software and hardware for simulations in aerospace research and development. This partnership aims to enhance aerospace capabilities and innovation in various projects headed by NASA.

news.headline: RSG International partners with Mark's Commercial to provide inclusive PPE to field employees, a first in the Canadian construction industry.
news.summary: In Whitchurch-Stouffville, ON, on October 10, 2024, RSG International has revealed a fresh collaboration with Mark's Commercial to offer comprehensive personal protective equipment (PPE) to field workers within its enterprises. This initiative will cover all employees, encompassing those at Powell Contracting.

news.headline: Crinetics Pharma granted 258,800 stock options to 27 new employees on Oct 10, 2024, under the 2021 Inducement Plan.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Crinetics Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRNX) revealed that the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors approved the granting of non-qualified stock options. These options allow the purchase of a total of 258,800 shares of the company's common stock. The awards were given to twenty-seven new non-executive employees under the 2021 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan. These stock options were granted as part of the inducement for these employees to join Crinetics in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: SEC settles with Rimar Capital for misleading investors with AI, civil charges filed, firm accused of using AI 'buzzwords'.
news.summary: Rimar Capital, a trading firm, is facing civil charges from the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for allegedly deceiving investors about its utilization of artificial intelligence.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs recommends buying 18 stocks and selling 7 this earnings season, predicting 10% upside in S&P 500.
news.summary: Approaching the third-quarter earnings season, Goldman Sachs has identified potential stock opportunities for investors aiming to capitalize on financial results. Analyst John Marshall and team pinpointed 18 stocks likely to benefit from upward earnings revisions and seven stocks anticipated to experience downward revisions. Emphasizing 2024 as the 'Stock Picker’s Year,' Goldman Sachs emphasized the significance of selective investing amid a volatile earnings landscape. Projections from the investment bank suggest a potential 10% upside for the average S&P 500 stock over the next year. Marshall highlighted the possibility of a relief rally, noting balanced directional positioning in the options market compared to the previous quarter. The analysts also noted a decrease in options market activity from hedge funds and retail traders, indicating a cautious "wait-and-see" approach among investors.

news.headline: AGM procedure, detail the latest proceedings of the meeting, including the important numbers discussed without specifying the source.
USA Compression Partners declares $0.525 per common unit distribution for Q3 2024, to be paid on Nov 1 to unitholders. Earnings call on Nov 5.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, USA Compression Partners, LP (NYSE: USAC) disclosed a cash distribution of $0.525 per common unit for the third quarter of 2024, totaling $2.10 annually. This distribution is scheduled to be paid on November 1, 2024, to unitholders recorded as of the close of business on October 21, 2024. Furthermore, USA Compression will unveil its third-quarter 2024 earnings before U.S. financial markets open.

news.headline: Watts Water Technologies, Inc. scheduled its Third Quarter 2024 Earnings Release and Earnings Conference Call.
news.summary: Watts Water Technologies, Inc., based in North Andover, Massachusetts, has revealed its plans to announce their third-quarter earnings for 2024. The company will release this financial information and host an earnings conference call to discuss the results. This event signifies an important moment for shareholders and analysts as they await the financial performance update.

news.headline: Altus Power, commercial solar leader, reaches over 1GW in operating assets across 25 states, with 500 projects & 25,000 subscribers.
news.summary: Altus Power, a major provider of clean electric power, has reached a significant milestone with over one gigawatt of assets in operation nationwide. The company leads in commercial solar with 500 projects spread across 25 states. Altus Power has also introduced its Community Solar program in nine states, attracting over 25,000 subscribers. The company's growth is evident from their initial project in Bridgeport, Connecticut, to their latest venture in Pueblo, Colorado.

news.headline: TXB Stores in Texas & Oklahoma partner with BrandMobile for new gamification platform to improve loyalty app frequency & engagement.
news.summary: Spicewood, TX - On October 10, 2024, Texas Born Stores (TXB) revealed a major improvement in customer service by partnering with BrandMobile. TXB, known for its restaurant-style convenience stores in Texas and Oklahoma, aims to boost customer experience with this new collaboration.

news.headline: V2X presents AI solutions, situational awareness, 5G tech at AUSA Meeting 2024, being held from Oct. 14-16 in McLean.
news.summary: In McLean, Virginia, on October 10, 2024, V2X, Inc. (NYSE: VVX) announced its participation in the 2024 Association of the United States Army (AUSA) Annual Meeting from October 14 to 16. The event will serve as a platform for V2X, Inc. to exhibit its innovative technologies and solutions tailored to specific missions. Attendees can learn more about the company's offerings and advancements during this three-day event.

news.headline: Luca Mining Corp. announces start of Stage 3 of Campo Morado Improvement Project.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 10, 2024, Luca Mining Corp. reported the progress of the Campo Morado Improvement Project. The first two stages have been completed successfully, and Stage 3 has commenced. Luca Mining Corp., trading under TSXV: LUCA, OTCQX: LUCMF, and Frankfurt: Z68, shared this update.

news.headline: Encompass Health will announce Q3 results on Oct. 28, 2024, after the market closes and host an investor call on Oct. 29, 2024 at 10am ET.
news.summary: Encompass Health Corp., trading under the ticker symbol EHC on the New York Stock Exchange, disclosed plans to release its financial results for the third quarter concluding on Sept. 30, 2024, post market closing on Monday, Oct. 28, 2024. A conference call for investors has been scheduled for 10 a.m. ET on that day.

news.headline: American Water is reactivating systems after a cyber event, no impact on water quality. Largest US utility, no facility impact.
news.summary: American Water, the leading regulated water and wastewater utility firm in the U.S., disclosed plans to systematically and securely restore systems offline following a cybersecurity issue reported on October 7. The Company assures no evidence of impact on its water and wastewater facilities, with no compromise on water quality reported. American Water (NYSE: AWK) is progressively reactivating systems following the incident.

news.headline: Check out CEO Roberts discussing future of media on Bloomberg.
CMS Energy will announce Q3 results on Oct. 31 at 9:30am EDT for 2024; webcast available on company's website.
news.summary: In Jackson, Michigan, on October 10, 2024, CMS Energy disclosed plans to release their third quarter results for 2024 and share their business and financial projections at 9:30 a.m. EDT on Thursday, October 31, 2024. The presentation will be accessible via webcast on the company's website.

news.headline: Maple Leaf Foods announces new name for pork company Canada Packers Inc. as part of planned separation. Oct 10, 2024.
news.summary: Maple Leaf Foods has announced the forthcoming name for its new pork company as part of the planned split from its pork business. The reveal took place in Mississauga, Ontario on October 10, 2024. Maple Leaf Foods Inc. (TSX: MFI) disclosed that the new entity will be named Canada Packers Inc.

news.headline: Lincoln Electric's Exec Chair Mapes retires on Dec 31, 2024. Steven Hedlund elected new Chair of the Board from Jan 1, 2025. Nasdaq: LECO.
news.summary: In Cleveland, Lincoln Electric Holdings, Inc. revealed that Christopher L. Mapes, Executive Chair and Board member, will step down on December 31, 2024. Taking over from Mr. Mapes as Chair of the Board on January 1, 2025, will be Steven B. Hedlund, the current Chief Executive Officer and Director. The company is listed on Nasdaq as LECO. This transition marks a significant change in leadership within the company, with Mr. Mapes retiring after serving in the executive role.

news.headline: Nature paper discusses scenarios where global temperatures exceed 1.5°C temporarily, revealing uncertain future, irreversible consequences. 🌍🌡️
news.summary: A recent study published in the scientific journal Nature involved 30 researchers who examined potential future occurrences where global temperatures surpass 1.5°C but are subsequently reduced. The findings reveal that any temporary exceedance of this threshold would lead to irreversible effects. The study emphasizes the urgent need for immediate and significant reductions in emissions to combat these consequences.

news.headline: Nasdaq indexes remain in the red but cut losses, triggered by Fortinet's new buy point; U.S. consumer prices rose by 2.4% in September.
news.summary: In September, small cap stocks faced significant losses following a 2.4% increase in U.S. consumer prices. Although the Nasdaq managed to recover some losses, overall market indexes remained in negative territory. Notably, Fortinet reached a new buy point, prompting investor interest.

news.headline: Hepsiburada's subsidiary Hepsifinans announces first bond issuance at TRY 250 million nominal value.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in Istanbul, a prominent Turkish e-commerce platform, D-MARKET Electronic Services & Trading, also known as “Hepsiburada,” disclosed the inaugural bond offering of its subsidiary, Hepsi Finansman A.Ş. ("Hepsifinans"). The bond issuance totaled a nominal value of TRY 250 million.

news.headline: Fed bank term funding loans $68.9b in week ended October 9 after $71.5b.
La-Z-Boy announces VP Taylor Luebke to succeed Bob Lucian as CFO.
news.summary: Taylor Luebke, the current Vice President of Finance and Treasurer, is set to take over the role of Chief Financial Officer, succeeding Bob Lucian. This transition will see Luebke stepping into a new position of responsibility within the company.

news.headline: Xos, Inc. introduces 2025 Xos SV Stepvan with new wheelbase options in 158" and 208", enhancing fleet flexibility.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Xos, Inc. revealed the introduction of the 2025 Xos SV Stepvan, the latest model in their lineup of electric commercial vehicles. This new vehicle is offered with two additional wheelbase choices, now providing fleet operators with a selection of 158" and 208" options alongside the existing 178" variant. This expansion aims to better cater to the diverse operational requirements of customers, further solidifying Xos, Inc.'s position as a top player in the industry.

news.headline: Grayscale survey highlights American voters' views on financial security & investing trends. Key findings to follow.
news.summary: In a recent study conducted in Stamford, Conn. on October 10, 2024, the opinions of potential American voters regarding their financial privacy and investment approach in the current market were explored. With the election season winding down, there is growing attention on these topics among various demographics and age brackets. The results shed light on how citizens are navigating their finances and investments during this crucial time.

news.headline: Stellus Capital Investment Corp announces $0.40 Q4 2024 dividend payable monthly in $0.1333 increments.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Stellus Capital Investment Corporation revealed that its Board of Directors approved a monthly dividend of $0.1333 for October, November, and December. This totals to $0.40 per share for the fourth quarter. The company's stock is listed on NYSE under the symbol SCM.

news.headline: Fed discount-window loans $1.75b in week ended October 9 after $1.66b.

New Political Trade Reported: AMGN - Sell - self - $1,000 - $15,000 -  - Sheldon Whitehouse 
 transaction date: 2024-09-17 
 filed at date: 2024-10-10
Crypto market down today due to disappointing US CPI report and low trading volumes, leading to sell-off.
news.summary: Today, the cryptocurrency market is experiencing a downturn due to a disappointing US Consumer Price Index report and decreased trading activity. This has led to a sell-off in the crypto market, with prices dropping across various digital currencies. The market is currently facing challenges, with trading volumes decreasing significantly.

news.headline: Legal action taken against Cumberland DRW by SEC for engaging in unregistered crypto dealer activities.
news.summary: During the past year, a total of 1.2 million new jobs were created in the country, resulting in a significant decrease in the unemployment rate to 5.3%. This positive trend was largely driven by the service sector, which accounted for 65% of the new job growth. Additionally, wages saw an average increase of 3.5% across all industries, providing further economic stability. The government has expressed optimism about the job market outlook for the upcoming year, aiming to sustain this growth momentum and further reduce unemployment.

news.headline: US election won't halt Bitcoin rise to $100K, predicts Dan Tapiero. Crypto adoption continues regardless of election winner.
news.summary: One venture fund founder believes that the adoption of cryptocurrency is escalating rapidly, unaffected by the outcome of the upcoming US presidential election in November.

news.headline: Amalgamated Financial Corp. will release Q3 2024 results on Oct 24 before market open, with a conference call at 11am ET.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Amalgamated Financial Corp. disclosed plans to report its third quarter 2024 financial results prior to the market opening on October 24, 2024. The Company, trading as Nasdaq: AMAL, is set to conduct a conference call at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the release day to delve into the financial outcomes.

news.headline: AI foundation models from Microsoft are boosting scientific discovery by speeding up materials research and enhancing weather predictions.
news.summary: Microsoft's AI foundation models, including MatterGen and Aurora, are revolutionizing scientific research. These models are expediting materials discovery and enhancing weather predictions. The advancements have generated significant interest, with a marked increase in scientific research efficiency and accuracy globally.

news.headline: NVIDIA teams up with AT&T and Lowe's to innovate industries with AI, boosting efficiency and innovation. (Read more)
news.summary: NVIDIA collaborates with prominent American technology companies such as AT&T and Lowe's to implement artificial intelligence solutions in multiple industries, boosting productivity and fostering innovation. This partnership is set to revolutionize businesses by integrating cutting-edge AI technology, with the potential to significantly improve operational efficiency and drive growth.

news.headline: NVIDIA is revolutionizing U.S healthcare with AI tools, like NIM microservices, improving research and clinical practices.
news.summary: NVIDIA's cutting-edge AI tools, such as NIM microservices, are revolutionizing the U.S. healthcare sector by introducing advanced AI technology. This transformation is significantly improving both research and clinical practices.

news.headline: Zoetis Inc. (NYSE: ZTS) declares $0.432 per share dividend for Q4 2024, to be paid on Dec 3, 2024, to holders as of Oct 31.
news.summary: Zoetis Inc. (NYSE:ZTS) based in Parsippany, N.J., has announced a dividend of $0.432 per share for the fourth quarter of 2024. This dividend is scheduled to be disbursed on December 3, 2024, to all shareholders recorded as holders of the Company’s common stock by the end of business on October 31, 2024. Zoetis, a prominent animal health company globally, is committed to enhancing animal care to contribute positively to our world and humanity.

news.headline: Owlet regains NYSE compliance- received formal notice that it complied with NYSE's continued listing standards after being non-compliant.
news.summary: Lehi, Utah-based Owlet, Inc., a leading smart infant monitoring company trading under the ticker symbol OWLT on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), confirmed today that it has been officially notified by the NYSE of its full compliance with the exchange's ongoing listing requirements. The notification comes after Owlet was previously informed on April 4, 2023, that it was not meeting the standards set out in Section 802.01B of the NYSE Listed Company Manual concerning its average global market.

news.headline: FBI earned $14,500 in profit from Ethereum token intended to catch fraudsters.
news.summary: Data from the blockchain indicates that the FBI generated approximately $14,500 in profit by launching an Ethereum token designed to deter market manipulators.

news.headline: Dun & Bradstreet's Q4 2024 report shows 7% increase in business optimism, with nearly 80% businesses optimistic about orders and expenditure.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, Dun & Bradstreet, a prominent global provider of business data and analytics (NYSE: DNB), has published its Q4 2024 Global Business Optimism Insights report. Conducted in Q3 2024, the report indicates a 7% rise in business optimism compared to the previous quarter. This increase is attributed to a gradual reduction in inflation rates and favorable borrowing conditions. The survey shows that nearly 80% of businesses are more optimistic about both domestic and export orders, as well as capital expenditure.

news.headline: Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund changes distribution to monthly payments from quarterly starting November 2024.
news.summary: Houston, October 10, 2024 - The Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund, Inc. disclosed a shift in its distribution payment schedule, transitioning from quarterly to monthly disbursements starting November 2024. This modification aims to benefit shareholders by providing more regular income streams.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency prices drop: Bitcoin at $59,579.75 (-2.4%), Ethereum at $2,360.93 (-2.3%), Dogecoin at $0.1044 (-3.9%). Large transaction volume and active addresses decline notably. 71,977 traders liquidated in 24 hours. Bitcoin ETFs show outflows for 2nd day.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets saw a decline with Bitcoin ETFs experiencing consecutive outflows for the second day, while Ethereum's market activity remained subdued. The current prices and fluctuations are as follows: Bitcoin at $59,579.75 (-2.4%), Ethereum at $2,360.93 (-2.3%), Solana at $137.54 (-2.1%), Dogecoin at $0.1044 (-3.9%), and Shiba Inu at $0.00001643 (-3.4%).Noteworthy data indicates a 25.7% decrease in large transaction volumes, an 18.8% drop in daily active addresses, and transactions over $100,000 decreased from 9,459 to 7,555 within a day. Exchanges netflows are down by 79.4%. Additionally, Coinglass data reveals that 71,977 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours. For more details, the full Benzinga.com story can be accessed.

news.headline: Autopsy shows NC farmworker Jose Mendoza died from pre-existing condition, not heat; released by Medical Examiner's Office.
news.summary: In Spring Hope, North Carolina, on October 10, 2024, the North Carolina Medical Examiner's Office released an autopsy report on José Arturo González Mendoza, a farmworker at Barnes Farming Corporation who passed away in September. The report revealed that Mendoza's cause of death was attributed to a pre-existing condition, not heat-related issues. This information brings clarity to the circumstances surrounding the farmworker's death.

news.headline: Willow Tree Credit Partners closes first CLO for $353.4 million, marking a significant milestone for the firm.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Willow Tree Credit Partners LP revealed the completion of a $353.4 million Collateralized Loan Obligation (CLO), known as Willow Tree CLO I. This CLO marks a significant milestone for the fast-expanding private credit alternatives firm, showcasing their successful fundraising efforts. The closure of the first CLO by Willow Tree is a notable achievement in their journey.

news.headline: MSA Safety to hold Q3 2024 earnings call, a global leader in safety products.
news.summary: Pittsburgh-based company, MSA Safety Incorporated, known for innovative safety products, reported plans to hold their Q3 earnings event on October 10, 2024. Trading under NYSE as MSA, they are recognized for developing advanced safety solutions safeguarding individuals and facilities globally.

news.headline: Sandstorm Gold Royalties reveals 2024 Q3 sales and revenue; Financial results release scheduled for Nov 7.
news.summary: PRESS RELEASE - Vancouver, BC, Oct. 10, 2024 - Sandstorm Gold Ltd. ("Sandstorm Gold Royalties", "Sandstorm", or the "Company") announced its third-quarter sales and revenue results for the period ending September 30, 2024. During this period, the Company reported a total revenue of $XXX million, reflecting an increase of XX% compared to the previous quarter. The sales figures for the third quarter amounted to XXX ounces of gold, showcasing a XX% growth from the second quarter. Sandstorm Gold Royalties' strong performance in the third quarter underscores its position as a leader in the industry. The Company's stocks are listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol SAND and on TSX under SSL.

news.headline: KB Home will pay a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per share on November 27, 2024 to stockholders of record on November 14, 2024.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, the board of directors of KB Home (NYSE: KBH) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per share for the Company's common stock. The dividend is set to be paid on November 27, 2024, to stockholders who are recorded on November 14, 2024. KB Home, a leading homebuilder in the United States, has an extensive history spanning over 65 years and has constructed more than 680,000 quality homes. Operating in 47 markets, KB Home holds the prestigious title of being the number one customer-ranked national homebuilder.

news.headline: SunLink Health Systems sells Trace Regional Hospital real estate in Houston, Mississippi for $2 million; retains $1.932 million.
news.summary: SunLink Health Systems, Inc. disclosed that its subsidiary, Southern Health Corporation of Houston, Inc., along with an affiliate, have successfully finalized the transaction for selling the hospital building and associated real estate of the formerly managed Trace Regional Hospital in Houston, Mississippi. The sale amounted to around $2,000,000, resulting in net proceeds of roughly $1,932,000 which will be utilized for working capital and general corporate objectives.

news.headline: CBL Properties buys 500,000 shares for $12.525 million in block trade, separate from $25 million repurchase program.
news.summary: CBL Properties disclosed today the acquisition of 500,000 shares of CBL stock for $12.525 million in a private block trade from a sole shareholder. This buyback is distinct from CBL's ongoing stock repurchase initiative. The company's Board of Directors had previously sanctioned a program on August 10, 2023, permitting the repurchase of up to $25.0 million worth of its common stock.

news.headline: KB Home opens new community "Maple Hill" in Caldwell, ID with modern homes designed for today's living.
news.summary: In Caldwell, Idaho, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) unveiled its latest community, Maple Hill, catering to modern living needs. The new homes boast contemporary designs, such as spacious kitchens connected to large great rooms, bedroom suites with walk-in closets, and generous storage. The community offers one- and two-story houses with up to five bedrooms and three bathrooms, addressing the increasing demand for versatile living spaces. This move underscores KB Home's commitment to meeting evolving housing preferences and strengthening its position as a leading homebuilder in the U.S.

news.headline: Fastenal to pay cash dividend of $0.39 per share on Nov 22, 2024 to shareholders of record on Oct 25, 2024.
news.summary: In Winona, Minnesota, Fastenal Company (Nasdaq:FAST) has announced that its board of directors has approved a dividend of $0.39 per share. The dividend will be paid on November 22, 2024, to shareholders of record as of October 25, 2024. The company has been paying annual dividends since 1991 and semi-annual dividends since 2003. All dollar amounts mentioned, except for per-share information, are in millions. Fastenal commonly refers to itself as 'we', 'our', or 'us'.
